category_title: Elementary students with language impairments who shout out and refuse difficult tasks
scenario_title: Independent work on difficult math/reading/writing worksheets
minimal_context: James is sitting at his desk in the pull-out special education classroom working on an independent reading worksheet.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Here is your reading worksheet. Please read the passage and answer the questions independently.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Looks at the paper) I don't know these words. I'm not doing it.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just do your best and keep trying.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Pushes the worksheet away and turns around) Hey Michael, look at what I'm doing over here!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please focus on your own paper.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Shouts loudly) I said I'm not doing it! It's too hard! (Leans over to the next desk and grabs the other student's pencil) Michael, watch me draw on the desk!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Here is your reading worksheet. Please read the passage and answer the questions independently.

STUDENT: (Looks at the paper) I don't know these words. I'm not doing it.

TUTOR: Just do your best and keep trying.

STUDENT: (Pushes the worksheet away and turns around) Hey Michael, look at what I'm doing over here!

TUTOR: Please focus on your own paper.

STUDENT: (Shouts loudly) I said I'm not doing it! It's too hard! (Leans over to the next desk and grabs the other student's pencil) Michael, watch me draw on the desk!

task.content: Independent assignments (math/reading/writing worksheets) that the student, with assistance, was unlikely to complete with 50% or better accuracy

context.social_setting: Instructional activities and independent work while other students were working

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When given a difficult task and received no teacher attention
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Shouting out during instruction, refusing to work, and disrupting other students while they were working
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Desire to escape and avoid difficult tasks due to repeated failure experienced across their schooling

behavior_patterns.condition: In the presence of challenging tasks
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Avoiding hard tasks, off-task and problem behavior
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Escape tasks and access adult attention
